{# tabs/analytics.html — Vendor analytics scorecard with response rate, ghost rate, scores. Receives: vendor (ORM object). Called by: views.py vendor_tab endpoint (tab_name='analytics'). Depends on: none (read-only display). #}

Vendor Scorecard

{{ vendor.vendor_score | round(1) if vendor.vendor_score is not none else '-' }}
{{ vendor.engagement_score | round(1) if vendor.engagement_score is not none else '-' }}
{{ (vendor.response_rate * 100) | round(1) if vendor.response_rate is not none else '-' }}{% if vendor.response_rate is not none %}%{% endif %}
{{ (vendor.ghost_rate * 100) | round(1) if vendor.ghost_rate is not none else '-' }}{% if vendor.ghost_rate is not none %}%{% endif %}
{{ vendor.avg_response_hours | round(1) if vendor.avg_response_hours is not none else '-' }}{% if vendor.avg_response_hours is not none %} hrs{% endif %}
{{ (vendor.overall_win_rate * 100) | round(1) if vendor.overall_win_rate is not none else '-' }}{% if vendor.overall_win_rate is not none %}%{% endif %}

Activity Summary

{{ vendor.total_outreach or 0 }}
{{ vendor.total_responses or 0 }}
{{ vendor.total_wins or 0 }}
{{ vendor.total_pos or 0 }}
{{ '$%.2f' | format(vendor.total_revenue or 0) }}
{{ (vendor.cancellation_rate * 100) | round(1) if vendor.cancellation_rate is not none else '-' }}{% if vendor.cancellation_rate is not none %}%{% endif %}
{% if vendor.engagement_computed_at %}

Scores last computed: {{ vendor.engagement_computed_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y') }}

{% endif %}
